mapper.select: SELECT * FROM daily_word_stats WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND book_id = #{bookId} AND stat_date = #{statDate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_word_stats (user_id, book_id, stat_date, learned_count, correct_count, wrong_count) VALUES (#{userId}, #{bookId}, #{statDate}, #{learnedCount}, #{correctCount}, #{wrongCount}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE learned_count = learned_count + VALUES(learned_count), correct_count = correct_count + VALUES(correct_count), wrong_count = wrong_count + VALUES(wrong_count)
